author: śrīmad⋅hari⋅dāsa⋅viracitama
verses:
sita⋅kṛṣṇa⋅padāmbuja⋅sakta⋅prabhuṁ
raghu⋅rūpa⋅kṛpā⋅amṛta⋅sikta⋅guruṁ
ayutā⋅yuta⋅sajjana⋅sevya⋅padaṁ
bhaja keśava⋅komala⋅kānta⋅padaṁ

pada⋅pallava⋅nindita⋅kañja⋅dalaṁ
dara⋅dāruṇiṁ⋅arcita⋅pāda⋅yugaṁ
caraṇāgra⋅rucā bhava⋅duḥkha⋅dalaṁ
bhaja keśava⋅komala⋅kānta⋅padaṁ

atilambita⋅bāhu⋅yugaṁ mṛdukaṁ
karuṇā⋅paripūrita⋅netra⋅yugaṁ
rajanīśa⋅viḍambi⋅sugātra⋅ruciṁ
bhaja keśava⋅komala⋅kānta⋅padaṁ

guru⋅sevana⋅mantra⋅japaika⋅paraṁ
nija⋅jīvana⋅dāna⋅sugupta⋅guruṁ
vṛṣabhānu⋅sutā⋅dayita⋅akhya⋅guruṁ
bhaja keśava⋅komala⋅kānta⋅padaṁ

nigamānta⋅viśārada⋅pātra⋅varaṁ
hari⋅bhakti⋅nirūpaka⋅veda⋅vacaḥ
iti ghoṣa⋅kṛtaṁ baladeva⋅tanuṁ
bhaja keśava⋅komala⋅kānta⋅padaṁ

para⋅tattva⋅vikalpita⋅viśvamiti
śruti⋅nirṇaya⋅khaṇḍana⋅khaḍga⋅dharaṁ
śruti⋅sāra⋅rasāmṛta⋅tattva⋅vidaṁ
bhaja keśava⋅komala⋅kānta⋅padaṁ

prabhupāda⋅pravartita⋅dhāma⋅pari⋅
krama⋅patra⋅pravartaka⋅śiṣya⋅varaṁ
rasikeśvari⋅liṅgita⋅kṛṣṇa⋅priyaṁ
bhaja keśava⋅komala⋅kānta⋅padaṁ

aruṇābha⋅paṭaṁ hari⋅nāma⋅rataṁ
vraja⋅bhāva⋅nimagna⋅hṛdaṁ śramaṇaṁ
mada⋅matta⋅gajaṁ prati siŋha⋅varaṁ
bhaja keśava⋅komala⋅kānta⋅padaṁ

nija⋅sevaka⋅vatsa⋅sudhenu⋅nibhaṁ
supathaḥ pari⋅rakṣaka⋅saṅgha⋅śiraṁ
nija⋅lekha⋅prapīḍita⋅dhūrta⋅janaṁ
bhaja keśava⋅komala⋅kānta⋅padaṁ

prabhupāda⋅dhanaṁ prabhupāda⋅janaṁ
prabhupāda⋅manoratha⋅pūrṇakaraṁ
prabhupāda⋅gatiṁ mama manda⋅manaḥ
bhaja keśava⋅komala⋅kānta⋅padaṁ
en_translation:
I worship the soft and beautiful lotus feet of Śrīla Keśava Gosvāmī Mahārāja. He is a Master deeply attached to the lotus feet of the Divine Couple, Śrī Śrī Rādhā-Kṛṣṇa. He is a Guru bathed in the nectarean mercy of Śrīla Raghunātha Dāsa Gosvāmī and Śrīla Rūpa Gosvāmī. His feet are served by millions of saintly persons.

I worship the soft and beautiful lotus feet of Śrīla Keśava Gosvāmī Mahārāja. His tender feet put the lotus petals to shame. His two lotus feet are worshipped by the poor and distressed. The splendor of His toenails destroys the sufferings of this material world.

I worship the soft and beautiful lotus feet of Śrīla Keśava Gosvāmī Mahārāja. He has long, graceful arms and is very gentle. His two eyes are filled with compassion. The beauty of His lovely body outshines the moon, the king of the night.

I worship the soft and beautiful lotus feet of Śrīla Keśava Gosvāmī Mahārāja. He is solely devoted to the service of His Guru. He is a confidential Guru who dedicated His entire life to His Master. He is known as the beloved associate of the daughter of Śrī Vṛṣabhānu.

I worship the soft and beautiful lotus feet of Śrīla Keśava Gosvāmī Mahārāja. He is the most expert vessel of the conclusions of Vedānta. His words explain the science of devotion to Lord Hari. He is non-different from the great teacher Śrīla Baladeva Vidyābhūṣaṇa.

I worship the soft and beautiful lotus feet of Śrīla Keśava Gosvāmī Mahārāja. He holds the sword of scriptural evidence that refutes the false conception of the world as being separate from the Supreme Truth. He is the knower of the nectarean essence of all the Vedas.

I worship the soft and beautiful lotus feet of Śrīla Keśava Gosvāmī Mahārāja. He is the best disciple who propagated the practice of circumambulating the holy places (dhāma-parikrama) established by Śrīla Prabhupāda. He is dear to Lord Kṛṣṇa and is embraced by the Queen of Rasikas, Śrīmati Rādhā⋅rāṇī.

I worship the soft and beautiful lotus feet of Śrīla Keśava Gosvāmī Mahārāja. He wears saffron garments and is devoted to the Holy Name. His heart is always immersed in the mood of Vraja. He is like a powerful lion against the mad elephant of false pride.

I worship the soft and beautiful lotus feet of Śrīla Keśava Gosvāmī Mahārāja. He is like a mother cow to His servants, who are like His calves. He is the leader of the community that protects the path of truth. He torments the deceitful with His powerful writings.

I worship the soft and beautiful lotus feet of Śrīla Keśava Gosvāmī Mahārāja. He is the wealth and the very life of Śrīla Prabhupāda. He fulfills all the desires of His Master. He is the ultimate destination of Śrīla Prabhupāda. O my foolish mind, please worship His lotus feet!
